items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival 🅰️🅰️ When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter show, you will definitely be grabbed by the eye by the mirror-like various items 👁️ Clean, elegant lines. Minimalist design and silhouette intersect. If you can only choose one piece, then you must choose this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant. Patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability. -Small and interesting shape, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder ❇️
TRIOMPHE snap closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Model No.: 118313
Color: Mirror Black (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 20.5x5.5x11

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY Shoulder Bag〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115703
Color: Patent Black (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4

New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CELINE New HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag, a must-have for Autumn/Winter! The rounded and smooth body shape looks a bit like the familiar AVA's enlarged version at first glance ~ Celine never disappoints 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 114713
Color: Beige/Tawny Brown
Size: 30x7.5x28.5

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Cotton jacquard Puzzle Fold Handbag
Linen natural color 1762b
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbags, the Puzzle Fold Handbag is reinterpreted with geometric architectural patchwork, fully foldable, making it a perfect travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This version is made of cotton jacquard.
Crossbody or handheld
Synthetic leather lining
LOEWE embroidery
215.5-31cm
